data.title: CoinEx was a gold sponsor at Taipei Blockchain Week 2025, with personalized photo booth interaction as a highlight. Attracting tens of attendees, the event took place from Sept 4-6 at Taipei's Songshan Cultural and Creative Park.
data.description: In Hong Kong on October 10, 2025, Taipei Blockchain Week 2025 (TBW) wrapped up after running from September 4th to 6th at Taipei's Songshan Cultural and Creative Park. Being a leading yearly event for Asia's cryptocurrency, blockchain, and AI industries, the conference drew in tens of participants.

data.title: BTC’s Mayer Multiple implies price could reach $180K before becoming 'overbought,' staying near ‘oversold’ at ATH.
data.description: During its recent record peaks, Bitcoin was observed to be nearing an "oversold" territory, indicated by the Mayer Multiple. This metric pointed towards a possible price objective of $180,000 for the cryptocurrency.

data.title: CoinEx sponsored TOKEN2049 Singapore 2025, reinforcing its blockchain commitment. A Gold Sponsor at the event.
data.description: CoinEx, a prominent crypto exchange platform, recently wrapped up its involvement as a Gold Sponsor at TOKEN2049 Singapore 2025 in Hong Kong on October 10, 2025. This move emphasizes their dedication to the blockchain sector and highlights their strong global brand impact. The company's participation at the event showcased their commitment to innovation and collaboration within the industry, further solidifying their position as a key player in the market.

data.title: Ant Group shares how digital innovation boosts environmental protection at IUCN Event, aiming to inspire millions to take climate actions through the Ant Forest model.
data.description: At the International Union for Conservation of Nature (IUCN) World Conservation Congress 2025 in Abu Dhabi, Eric Jing, Chairman of Ant Group, highlighted the potential impact of the Ant Forest model in promoting environmental awareness and climate actions. Utilizing digital platforms, this model engages users in interactive ways to inspire meaningful change. By converting "points" into tangible real-world impact, the Ant Forest model has the capacity to motivate millions of individuals towards taking steps to address climate issues. Jing's remarks underscore the transformative power of this approach in mobilizing large numbers of people towards sustainable actions.
